race.description: Duttons Easy To Do Business With Maiden Plate
race.comment: INNOMINATE (11) once again left herself with too much to do last start when sent out fave but did pick up strongly late to get within a length of the winner. Blinkers going on should sharpen her up and if they can utilise the inside pillar, she will prove more than just a handful to stop. SILENT ANSWER (14) will find this much easier, dropping back from LR Clare Lindop Stakes at Morphettville where she was always a long way back. The car park draw will see her settle at the rear again but if the tempo is genuine she can reel them in. THE PUNK ROCKER (2) improved again last start when only finding a couple better over this trip at Strathalbyn. Peaking now and is worth some thought from the kinder draw. LITTLE ONE (5) was much better last start and is worth including in minors on the short turnaround.
